generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and taxpayer, I've always believed in strong alliances for our security. But have you seen what's happening with our bases? Crumbling infrastructure, delayed maintenance - it's a national security risk. Our allies aren't pulling their weight either. Remember when the European Command's power grid failed last winter? That's not just an inconvenience, it's a vulnerability. We can't afford to be the only ones investing in our collective defense. It's time our partners step up before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
